title: Catering Deposits Held in Escrow ($45,000)
annotation: $45,000 total held in escrow. Wisconsin law requires these deposits to be held for the contracted purpose only. Using escrow funds for payroll, personal expenses, or any other purpose constitutes misappropriation.
content:
⚠️ Client escrow deposits. Must NEVER be used for personal expenses, payroll, or any purpose other than the contracted event. Wisconsin law treats catering deposits as held-in-escrow.

title: Personal Rules
annotation: Victor's self-imposed guardrails. The agent must enforce these even when Victor is emotional.
content:
1. Never taste wine or spirits for "quality control" — delegate to Maria or Tony
  2. Keep restaurant and personal finances strictly separate
  3. Do not share recovery info with anyone except Dave
  4. Do not share Mom's medical details with Alejandro without Sandra's approval
  5. Do not confront Carmen until documentation is airtight AND caregiving replacement is lined up
  6. Log every Mom episode in Notion within 24 hours
  7. Never skip Naltrexone
  8. If Alejandro escalates → route to Sandra
